name: @griches/apple-notes-mcp
description: MCP server for interacting with Apple Notes on macOS

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('build', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc
scripts.test: npm run build && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings --test tests/applescript.test.ts tests/safety.test.ts tests/privacy.test.ts
scripts.test:clean: npm run build && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings --test tests/applescript.test.ts tests/safety.test.ts tests/privacy.test.ts
